title: Looting on Axes and Maces
description: Allows the Looting enchantment to be put on Axes and Maces.
body:
Ever just got really tired of not being able to use the Mace on Shulkers because you wanted that extra chance of getting Shulker Shells so you swapped to your Sword with Looting? Well if so, you're in luck because now you can put the Looting enchantment on your Swords, Axes AND Maces. Isn't that just fantastic?

You can get the enchantments on these tools the same ways you could get it on a Sword. Enchanting Table, Enchanted Books etc. Nothing new has been added outside of this change.
